title: Liquid Death
tagline: B&W chrome + neon-only-in-photography. Variants test display-scale typography, catalog-amplified IA, and manifesto-as-spine commerce.

direction.phrase: Brand-faithful Mode A. Palette pinned (B&W chrome; neon stays inside captured product photography). Typography pinned (Acumin Pro / Acumin Pro Condensed). Density commercial-dense. IA-priority preserves product grid above the fold + SHOP verbs as primary.
movements: display-scale: ad-hoc → 1.333 modular, D1 at 120-180px desktop
manifesto: body-copy on thumbnail bg → D1/D2 invert-bg full-bleed

palette.name: Liquid Death brand-pinned
brandFaithfulInversions: neon accents stay inside product photography only

originalCritique: The brand is unmistakable — B&W chrome, condensed-bold caps, horror-comedy voice, campaign photography (Pop-Tarts, Country Club, Death Peddlers, Tony Hawk). But the home undercuts every asset: display type runs at ad-hoc body sizes, the anti-plastic manifesto sits at body-copy scale on a thumbnail background image, and uncropped campaign photographs are reduced to thumbnails between catalog rows. The load-bearing visual move is condensed-bold caps; the page never lets it work at full size.

variants.name: Faithful + improvements
variants.thesis: Same IA: product grid above the fold, SHOP verbs primary. Apply identified improvements: 1.333 modular scale, D1 at 120-180px on hero, manifesto promoted to display type on invert-bg, campaign photography uncropped.
variants.fix: Same IA — product grid above the fold, SHOP verbs primary. Apply identified improvements. Display scale locks at 1.333 modular and D1 hits 120-180px on the hero so the brand's load-bearing condensed-bold caps finally work at full size. The anti-plastic manifesto promotes from body copy to D1/D2 display on invert-bg, full-bleed. Campaign photography (Pop-Tarts, Country Club, Tony Hawk) uncrops.

variants.name: Catalog amplified
variants.thesis: The cans ARE the brand. Doubles down on catalog density: typography is the hero, the cans are the dominant photo, editorial campaign images stitch BETWEEN catalog rows rather than ABOVE them. "Says the quiet part loud."
variants.fix: The cans ARE the brand. The captured site already has the catalog (18+ SKUs) as the dominant block — B doubles down. Typography is the hero, the cans are the dominant photo, editorial campaign images stitch BETWEEN catalog rows rather than above them. The page reads as a catalog with attitude, not attitude with a catalog underneath.

variants.name: Manifesto-first
variants.thesis: The brand stance becomes the spine; commerce becomes the evidence. The anti-plastic manifesto opens the page at full display scale; campaign photography earns its full pixels; product grid moves below the manifesto and editorial.
variants.fix: The brand stance becomes the spine; commerce becomes the evidence. The anti-plastic manifesto opens the page at full display scale on invert-bg. Campaign photography earns its full pixels — Tony Hawk uncropped, Death Peddlers full-bleed. The product grid moves below the manifesto and editorial. The page reads as a manifesto with a store attached, which is how the brand actually positions itself.
